description: Get dressed for the Great Indian Wedding in these slipper-style wedges from catwalk for a classy ethnic look. The beaded straps lend a dose of festivity to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe.UpperThong style straps for durability and protectionHeavy bead work with woven detailing for added styleSynthetic lining for soft comfortMidsoleSynthetic footbed with stitch detailing for durability and styleOutsoleWedge heels for better supportTPU outsole with wave grooves on the forefoot for extra gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
